SEARCH

Uses of Class
timgutilities.textio.RunnableCommand

  • Uses of RunnableCommand in timgutilities.textio

    Methods in timgutilities.textio with parameters of type RunnableCommand
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    TextIOUtils.selectAndRunLoop(String prompt, RunnableCommand[] runableCommands, boolean insertQuit)
    display the prompt, then a list of command names strings from the entries in the RunnableCommands, if insertQuit is present then a quit option is added as the first option.
    static void
    TextIOUtils.selectAndRunLoop(String prompt, RunnableCommand[] runableCommands, boolean insertQuit, boolean confirmQuit)
    display the prompt, then a list of command names strings from the entries in the RunnableCommands, if insertQuit is present then a quit option is added as the first option.
    static void
    TextIOUtils.selectAndRunLoop(String prompt, RunnableCommand[] runableCommands, boolean insertQuit, boolean confirmQuit, boolean quitFirst)
    display the prompt, then a list of command names strings from the entries in the RunnableCommands, if insertQuit is present then if quitFirst is present a quit option is added as the first option, if quitFirst is false then the quit option will be the last option.
